description_long: This object is a tall, slender street light with a single, gently curved arm extending from the top of a cylindrical pole. The pole is predominantly black with a weathered, lighter-colored base that appears to be made of concrete or metal, providing stability. The lamp head is oval-shaped, modern in style, and features a yellowish diffuser or lens that likely softens and spreads the emitted light. The lamp head is mounted at the end of the arm, projecting outward and downward to illuminate the area below. The overall design is utilitarian and contemporary, suitable for urban streets, sidewalks, or parking lots. There are no visible decorative elements on the pole, emphasizing function over ornamentation.
description: A modern, black street light with a curved arm and an oval lamp head featuring a yellow diffuser, mounted on a sturdy, light-colored base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved arm extending leftward with the lamp head at the end and the cylindrical pole with a light-colored base.
description_view_1: Frontal view with the lamp head facing directly forward, revealing the yellow diffuser and the straight alignment of the pole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the arm extending rightward, highlighting the smooth curve and the lamp head's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the lamp head and the full height of the pole with its base.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern oval-shaped lamp head with a smooth, streamlined profile and a yellowish diffuser covering the light source; no visible decorative elements.
